# INSortType.byDate

**Case**

The sorted items are in date order.

## Declaration

```swift
case byDate
```

## Discussion

You may specify this sort type regardless of whether the search included a date as one of the search parameters.

## Constants

- **INSortType.unknown**: The sort order is unknown.
- **INSortType.asIs**: The sorted items are in the order returned.
